name: Octanoyl-CoA:oxygen 2-oxidoreductase (C8)

name: (S)-Hydroxyoctanoyl-CoA hydro-lyase (C8)

name: (S)-Hydroxyhexanoyl-CoA hydro-lyase (C6)
reason: C6 hydratase; was a documented gap

name: (S)-3-Hydroxybutanoyl-CoA hydro-lyase (C4)

name: myristoyl-CoA:acetyl-CoA C-myristoyltransferase (C16->C14)

name: ATP/AMP antiport (Ant1-like) peroxisomal
reason: ATP/AMP antiport stub; required for fatty acyl-CoA activation

name: CoA peroxisomal equilibration

reason: galU was unable to enter the cytosol; needed before any catabolism

name: D-galacturonate reductase (NADPH; GAR1, fungal)
